nasb.text: And Gideon the son of Joash died at a ripe old age and was buried in the tomb of his father Joash, in Ophrah of the Abiezrites.

esv.text: And Gideon the son of Joash died in a good old age and was buried in the tomb of Joash his father, at Ophrah of the Abiezrites.

cnv.text: 約阿施的兒子基甸壽數滿足而死，埋葬在亞比以謝族的俄弗拉，在他父親約阿施的墳墓裡。

ccb.text: 约阿施的儿子基甸年高寿终，葬在亚比以谢族的俄弗拉，在他父亲约阿施的坟墓里。
